use_codes.desc: INTRA-ARTERIAL AND INTRAVENOUS USES OF ULTRAVIST
METHOD OF CONDUCTING RADIOLOGICAL EXAMINATION OF A PATIENT BY ADMINISTERING TO SAID PATIENT A RADIOPAQUE AMOUNT OF IOPROMIDE

indications.text:
®
ULTRAVIST Injection is an iodinated contrast agent indicated for:
1.1 Intra-Arterial Procedures*
• 300 mg I/mL for cerebral arteriography and peripheral arteriography
• 370 mg I/mL for coronary arteriography and left ventriculography, visceral angiography, and aortography

regions) for the evaluation of neoplastic and non-neoplastic lesions in adults.
